title: selaginella polita
intro: Selaginella polita, also known as the narrow spike moss, is a species of evergreen fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella polita include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and improve respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Selaginella polita is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
